title: Personalized App Icon Grid AI
sourceTitle: Personalized App Icon Grid AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a 12-item grid of square glossy 3D personalized app icons, arranged 3 columns by 4 rows, floating on a clean white studio background. Overall character: cute 3D creator boy with black hair, big eyes, tiny wooden carousel-horse hair accessory. app categories: chat, payment, shopping, short video, delivery, search, food service, ride, music, streaming, lifestyle notes, Q&A. grid layout: 3 columns by 4 rows, square glossy icons floating on white studio background. style: modern premium 3D icon render, soft shadows, reflections, realistic textures.
imagePrompts.title: Generic App Grid Cute Creator

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a 12-icon 3D personalized app grid using generic app categories and fictional symbols instead of real app logos. theme: A reusable 3D app icon grid built around friendly 3D travel planner avatar with orange backpack and camera strap. signature elements: fictional app symbols, consistent glossy 3D surface style, equal grid rhythm, and no real platform logos app categories: map, ticket, hotel, weather, budget, camera, itinerary, translate, train, taxi, food, notes. grid layout: 4 by 3 rounded icon grid with equal spacing and soft floor shadows. composition: stable composition, clear focal subject, organized supporting elements, balanced negative space, and no clutter. style: glossy travel-app icon set, no real logos, consistent color accents. restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition, avoid real logos and replace brands with fictional or generic marks when publishing subject: friendly 3D travel planner avatar with orange backpack and camera strap as the primary visual subject, kept clear and recognizable while the template style remains stable color palette: controlled neon accents with deep cinematic contrast lighting: lighting supports the template mood with controlled highlights, readable details, and no overexposed glow camera: camera crop and viewpoint are chosen to keep the subject readable and preserve the source prompt perspective materials: specific material surfaces, reflections, texture, and product-grade finish remain legible typography: visible text must be short, intentional, readable, and limited to the specified title, labels, UI regions, or annotations Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
